chapters.title: The starting line
chapters.body: Back + Triceps. Lat pulldown 95×14, seated row 49.5×14, cable rope pushdown 27.5×14. You weren’t new to lifting — you’d been at it for a while. This was just the day the log started keeping score.

chapters.title: Showing up
chapters.body: Nine sessions in April while engineering finals stacked up. April 21: first time touching 27.5 lb on the bicep curl — only 3 reps, but the bar moved. Cardio became a regular thing.

chapters.title: Engineering closed
chapters.body: Robin Sacks granted the +1% petition on TEP442. UofT Engineering with Honours by 0.0161 points. You logged session 27 the same week. The gym kept going while the rest of your life closed a chapter.

chapters.title: The cut begins
chapters.body: Face transformation. Target: ~76 kg, ~15% BF, six months out. Insulin resistance to manage. Two meals. No isopure. The goal shifted from “show up” to “strip down.”

chapters.title: Bedroom matched the gym
chapters.body: Front raises 15.5×12×3, then bicep curl 15.5 → 23 → 25 × 10 each set. You matched your all-time 25×10 top set with the dumbbells in your room — two weeks after crashing at 25×7 in the gym. First entry tagged “home.”

insights.text: Back hasn't been trained in 16 days
Chest hasn't been trained in 21 days
Seated Row Machine just hit a new PR — keep pushing
Single Arm Dumbbell Row just hit a new PR — keep pushing

sets.notes: only 20sec rest after 110x10 — new top weight
+5 add-on engaged at each weight (effective ~75/85/95/105 if magnetic adder works — needs verification)
post-leg cardio block, fat burn focus
4-way complex (×4 arm movements per rep = 40 movements)
Brachioradialis pain flared on R arm — pushed through
Brachioradialis pain — stopped after this set
different machine, felt heavier than usual
first time hammer curl - each hand
different face pull machine/cable - not comparable to 40lb sets above
First-ever skull crusher set, learning movement

sessions.notes: Treadmill incline walk 20min warmup, then arms
4 PRs: Seated Row 95x16, Lat Pulldown 110x10 + 120x5, DB Row 30x8, Face Pull 47.5x8. Cardio first.

Bicep 4-way complex (each rep = L curl + R curl + L hammer + R hammer = 4 arm movements per rep). Brachioradialis flare on right arm during preacher — same insertional tendon issue as last year. Should return to cable-only bicep protocol.
Home workout. Dumbbell front raises + bicep curls (each-hand).
Push day, chest secondary focus + triceps primary focus
